records.ety: [L. inhalare to breathe upon; pref. in- in + halare to breathe: cf. F. inhaler. Cf. Exhale.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Inhaled (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Inhaling.]

defs: To breathe or draw into the lungs; to inspire; as, to inhale air; -- opposed to exhale.
quotes: Martin was walking forth to inhale the fresh breeze of the evening.
